arguments.title: Revised remote work policy brief
arguments.content:
## Revised remote work policy brief

Teams may work remotely up to three days per week when service coverage, data security, and manager coordination requirements are met.

Implementation notes:
- Managers confirm coverage windows every Monday.
- Employees use approved devices and secure networks.
- Exceptions require written approval and a review date.
